payload.answer: I could not save this article as durable memory because the provided URL could not be fetched or verified. I can remember the user's intent to save an article on memory architecture only if supplied with recoverable article details such as title, author, excerpt, or full text.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL could not be fetched due to a 404/network error, so no durable article content or metadata can be verified.

details: Fetch failed for https://example.com/missing with 404/network error.
No memory cards were created because article content and metadata are unverifiable.

repair_options: Provide the article title, author, publication date, or excerpt.
Provide the full article text to save a summary or key points.
Provide a working URL or archived copy.
Save only a tentative note that the user wanted to remember an unavailable article for memory architecture.
